description: User Fred reported a cockroach lurking on the corner of the table during dinner. Restaurant offered a 10% discount instead of comping the meal. This is a direct consumer complaint.
notes: Primary incident that triggered this investigation.

description: Commercial explosion at Nawabi Hyderabad House in Concord at 8:31 PM. Two people injured. Concord Fire Department responded. Described as 'some type of explosion' by Engine Co. 5.
source: WBTW News / WCNC / Concord Fire Dept Facebook
notes: Explosion caused 2 injuries. May indicate gas safety or kitchen infrastructure issues.

description: Mecklenburg County Health Department shut down Curry N Cake after finding 'large roach presence'. Roaches crawling on pans, in microwave, on lights and walls. Scored 71 (C grade). Permit suspended.
source: Charlotte Observer / WSOC TV / Charlotte Alerts
notes: Restaurant was shut down. Manager acknowledged the issue.

restaurant_name: Masti Indian Restaurant and Bar (formerly Pudina)
description: As Pudina: Scored 74.5 (C grade) with 22 violations. Dead cockroaches behind dishwasher, cockroach droppings throughout kitchen walls, fruit flies in bag of onions, cigarettes above food prep area, food build-up in coolers and microwave.
source: Patch / NC Public Health Inspection Report
notes: One of the worst inspection scores for an Indian restaurant in Charlotte history.

restaurant_name: Masti Indian Restaurant and Bar (formerly Pudina)
description: As Masti: Scored 86 (B grade). Inspectors found 'multiple cockroaches of various sizes'. Roach found in rice. Restaurant was to be suspended.
notes: Repeat offender — cockroach issues spanning 6+ years under different names (Pudina -> Masti). Same address.
